history.qwen_rationale: Adding org.openrewrite.java.spring.framework.UpgradeSpringFramework_6_1 to the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade step applies the necessary Spring Framework 6 API migration recipes, fixing the HttpStatus method reference and other related breaking changes before compilation.
